Section.Inference: Atmospheric intro with changing meters, establishing a bass vamp at bar 11. Ends with |:.
Theme A features a sustained melody over a Dm vamp, moving to Gm.
Theme B introduces a rhythmic melody and ends with a descending chromatic bass progression.
Theme C uses block chords in the melody over Dm and Gm bass vamps.
Climactic sequence over descending chromatic bass, leading to turnaround. Ends with :|.
